chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Jail Appeal No. D – 121 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.792/2023 (561-A, Cr.P.C.) 31.08.2023 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for appellants. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This appeal was disposed of vide judgment dated 17.08.2023 on the basis of compromise between the parties and on the fact that appellants had already deposited Rs.13,36,686/- as share of minors of deceased Arbelo. However, release writ was not issued as the appellants were directed to submit the compensation amount of Rs.20,00,000/-, besides differential amount in Diyat as the notification for the year 2023-24 was not issued and was in the pipeline. By this application, learned Counsel has submitted that appellants have already deposited compensation amount of Rs.20,00,000/-, as ordered by this Court, to be paid to the legal heirs of both deceased, whereas, as per news published in the newspaper, Diyat amount for the year 2023-24 has been fixed as Rs.67,57,902/-, and by this calculation, the differential amount, to be paid by the appellants to the share of minors would be Rs.7,55,046/-, which the appellants are ready to pay. Learned Additional Prosecutor General submits that the notification has not been issued so far, but the Cabinet decision has already been made. On the last date of hearing, Accountant of this Court was directed to submit the report of differential amount and as per his report, in terms of new Diyat amount fixed by the Government for the year 2023-24, share of minors of deceased Arbelo would be Rs.7,55,046/-.

Learned Additional Prosecutor General submits that the notification has not been issued so far, but the Cabinet decision has already been made. On the last date of hearing, Accountant of this Court was directed to submit the report of differential amount and as per his report, in terms of new Diyat amount fixed by the Government for the year 2023-24, share of minors of deceased Arbelo would be Rs.7,55,046/-. Cr. Jail Appeal No. D – 121 of 2022 Page 2 of 2 Let appellants deposit the same amount to the share of minors of deceased Arbelo. If the amount is paid by the appellants, the same may be deposited in some profitable scheme and thereafter release writ for the appellants be issued accordingly. Listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
